jsonLd.title: Shadowfax is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Shadowfax invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of E-commerce Executive at our Agra location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Shadowfax:
Shadowfax is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shadowfax!
